DEFENDANT JOSEPH WILSON'S Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE A PROOF OF SERVICE. (301/DM) Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR: 4819

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

RULING:
